faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Baychester?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Baychester range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Baychester homes?
faqs.answer: Baychester's proximity to parks and green spaces, combined with the area's residential architecture with basements and crawl spaces, attracts crickets seeking shelter and moisture. They're especially active from late summer through fall as they search for warm places to overwinter.

faqs.question: Are cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and can provide eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians will advise you on any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
